description.ko: 디지털 에너지와 자연스러운 움직임 사이의 완벽한 전이를 탐구하는 시각적 걸작으로, 생명의 호흡을 모방한 유체 역학을 특징으로 합니다.
description.en: A visual masterpiece exploring the seamless transition between digital energy and natural movement, featuring fluid dynamics that mimic the breath of life.

prompt: A mesmerizing abstract visualization titled AURA-7, focusing on the theme of Organic Flow. Fluid, translucent ribbons of light swirling in a weightless void. The aesthetic combines bioluminescent cellular patterns with silk-like liquid textures. Soft gradients of deep emerald, pearlescent white, and shimmering gold. High-speed fluid dynamics, macro photography style, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic textures.
